meta.title: XPOTrans — International Freight Forwarding from Uzbekistan | Full-Cycle Logistics
meta.description: XPOTrans — trusted international freight forwarder. Air, sea, rail and road transport. Full customs clearance. Delivery to 60+ countries. Quote within 2 hours.
meta.ogTitle: XPOTrans — International Freight Forwarding & Logistics from Uzbekistan
meta.ogDescription: International cargo delivery by air, sea, rail and road. Customs clearance included. 60+ countries covered. Request a quote in 2 hours.

hero.introShort: Full-cycle international freight operator. We deliver cargo to 60+ countries — on time, every time.
hero.introLong: Full-cycle international freight operator. Air, sea freight, rail and road — with end-to-end customs clearance and full shipment control at every stage.

cards.title: AIR FREIGHT
cards.desktopDesc: Priority air freight with guaranteed transit times and full customs handling.

cards.title: RAIL TRANSPORT
cards.mobileDesc: Rail cargo across CIS and Europe
cards.desktopDesc: Cost-efficient container rail shipments via Eurasian corridors — a reliable alternative to air freight.

cards.title: SEA FREIGHT
cards.desktopDesc: Direct contracts with major shipping lines. Full and consolidated container shipments on all ocean routes.

cards.title: LCL (GROUPAGE CARGO)
cards.desktopDesc: Regular LCL consolidation departures — the optimal solution for small batches without paying for a full container.

cards.title: OVERSIZED CARGO
cards.desktopDesc: Project cargo transport for heavy-lift and oversized loads: heavy machinery, industrial equipment, steel structures.

cards.title: HAZARDOUS CARGO
cards.desktopDesc: Licensed transport of hazardous goods across all ADR/IATA classes with a full set of required permits and documentation.

cards.title: CUSTOMS CLEARANCE
cards.desktopDesc: Full import and export customs clearance: declaration, certification, duties and direct liaison with customs authorities.

cards.title: WAREHOUSING
cards.desktopDesc: Consolidation, bonded storage and cargo handling at modern warehouses located at key transit hubs.

geography.title: Shipping Geography
geography.description: We handle international freight to 60+ countries: China, Europe, USA, Canada, CIS and the Middle East. Direct routes and multimodal solutions across Eurasia.

steps.title: Inquiry & Quote
steps.text: Submit a request — within 2 hours you will receive a detailed commercial offer with cost, transit time and route calculation.

steps.title: Route Planning
steps.text: We select the optimal transport mode and route based on your cargo type, required lead time, budget and safety requirements.

steps.title: End-to-End Delivery
steps.text: We pick up the cargo, handle customs clearance and deliver to the consignee's door — with full control at every stage.

about.description: Specialised in international freight forwarding and logistics from Uzbekistan. For over 12 years we have helped businesses build efficient supply chains — without delays or hidden costs.

map.title: International Freight Routes
map.description: We deliver cargo to 60+ countries: China, Europe, USA, CIS, Middle East. Air, sea, rail, road and multimodal solutions — we find the optimal route for every shipment.

chat.defaultMessage: Hello! I can help you calculate freight costs, choose the best route, or answer questions about customs clearance. How can I assist you?

items.question: How is the international freight cost calculated?
items.answer: The cost depends on transport mode, cargo weight and volume, route, urgency and Incoterms. We prepare an individual quote covering all costs — delivery, customs clearance, insurance — with no hidden fees.

items.question: How long does international cargo delivery take?
items.answer: Transit times depend on the transport mode: air freight 18–48 hours, road transport 5–12 days, rail 14–25 days, sea freight 25–40 days. Exact transit times are confirmed in the commercial offer after route calculation.

items.question: What documents are required for customs clearance?
items.answer: The standard package includes a commercial invoice, packing list, contract (for international trade) and transport documents (CMR, AWB or bill of lading depending on mode). Some cargo categories require compliance certificates. We help prepare the full document set.

items.question: Do you provide customs clearance services?
items.answer: Yes. Customs clearance is a core competency of XPOTrans: cargo declaration, calculation and payment of duties, and direct liaison with customs authorities at every stage of transit.

items.question: Can I track my shipment in real time?
items.answer: Yes. For every shipment we provide regular status updates and tracking access at key milestones: loading, transit, arrival, customs clearance and delivery to the consignee.

items.question: Do you offer cargo insurance?
items.answer: Yes. We offer cargo insurance for all transport modes. The premium is calculated individually based on the declared value and nature of the goods.

items.question: Is there a minimum cargo volume?
items.answer: No. We handle full container and full truck loads (FCL/FTL) as well as consolidated groupage cargo (LCL/LTL) for smaller shipments — with no minimum volume restrictions.

items.question: What payment options are available?
items.answer: Payment is made by bank transfer for legal entities. Regular clients can benefit from individual payment terms, including partial prepayment or payment on delivery.
